headers.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' https: data:; font-src 'self' https: data:; connect-src 'self' https://pokeapi.co https://*.pokeapi.co; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; upgrade-insecure-requests
